column5: Brownish grey silty medium to coarse SAND. (FILL)
Angular GRAVEL and COBBLES of moderately decomposed granite and fine to medium coarse SAND and some red bricks and concrete fragments. (FILL)

Moderately strong, brownish pink moderately to completely decomposed medium to coarse grained GRANITE. Closely to medium spaced and occasionally widely spaced, very close to extremely narrow, rough planar, infinite, iron-stained and kaolin coated joints, dipping 10 degrees-20 degrees & 70 degrees-80 degrees.
Moderately strong, brownish pink spotted black and white, highly to moderately decomposed medium to coarse grained GRANITE.
